rules.name: ui-check-index-before-new-primitive
rules.evidence: use `_Shadcn_` suffixed variants for form primitives. Check `packages/ui/index.tsx` before creating new primitives.

rules.name: styling-no-hardcoded-colors-edit
rules.evidence: Tailwind only, semantic tokens (`bg-muted`, `text-foreground-light`), no hardcoded colors.

rules.name: styling-no-hardcoded-colors-write
rules.evidence: Tailwind only, semantic tokens (`bg-muted`, `text-foreground-light`), no hardcoded colors.

rules.name: studio-shortcuts-use-registry-edit
rules.evidence: Prefer registered, discoverable shortcuts over one-off keyboard listeners; keep `G then ...` chords for navigation.

rules.name: studio-shortcuts-use-registry-write
rules.evidence: Prefer registered, discoverable shortcuts over one-off keyboard listeners; keep `G then ...` chords for navigation.

always_on: Stack facts: pnpm 10 + Turborepo monorepo, requires Node >= 22.
Structure table listing directory purposes (apps/studio, apps/docs, apps/www, packages/ui, packages/common, e2e/studio) — pure reference, no obligation attached.
Common Commands block — a flat list of pnpm/turbo commands with no ordering or obligation attached (install, dev, test, build, lint, typecheck).
Language convention: use U.S. English everywhere — too universal (comments, UI copy, docs) to bind to a specific file-type trigger.

low_confidence.reason: doc says 'import from ui' but never specifies which import path constitutes a violation; a regex targeting direct @radix-ui imports is inferred by convention, not stated in the text
doc says 'prefer registered shortcuts over one-off keyboard listeners' but never names the API (addEventListener/onKeyDown); the detection pattern is inferred by convention
doc says 'avoid barrel re-export files' but never names the filename convention (index.ts/tsx) used to detect one
doc says 'co-locate sub-components with parent' without naming any directory or file pattern; trigger is broadly scoped to all Write calls under apps/studio

questions: The 'import from ui' rule — should it require-read on every edit to any .ts/.tsx file in the repo, or only within component-consuming code such as apps/studio and packages/ui? Tentative: repo-wide via \.(tsx|ts)$; alternative: scope to apps/* and packages/ui only.

'Co-locate sub-components with parent' — should require-read fire on every new file written anywhere under apps/studio, or only within specific component directories (e.g. apps/studio/components/**)? Tentative: all Write under apps/studio; alternative: a narrower path.

'Prefer registered shortcuts over one-off keyboard listeners' — should the trigger detect addEventListener('keydown', ...) / onKeyDown= specifically, or is a different signal intended? Tentative: that pattern; alternative: drop the rule as too hard to detect reliably.
